coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 296-group, 2,413-node closure, including its six-object pipe structure collection.
validation: The authored six-way pipe layout, generated sleeves, SDF joint shell, dual-mesh smoothing, and structure toggle run in-browser. Collection Info and the instance-domain For Each zone preserve Blender's full affine transforms. Blender's transient first Volume Cube is 25 x 24 x 23: float fields linked to its integer resolution sockets truncate toward zero. Matching that coercion advances the authored result from 11,226 / 8,118 to 11,163 / 8,064 versus Blender's 11,162 / 8,064, with identical four-decimal bounds. The second Volume to Mesh and complete pre-autosmooth shell are topology-count exact at 3,308 / 3,306. Full-precision probes prove the 18,060-point source, 1,518-vertex hull, all 3,032 loop triangles, and direct Geometry Proximity results are bit-exact. The remaining difference begins only inside Blender's nested global-coordinate FloatGrid context: 42 of 13,800 first-grid samples cross zero relative to the local-space VM. That later leaves one extra 30-degree auto-smooth edge selection (126 versus 125) and one vertex; at joint size 18 the one-edge difference creates two vertices. Every face remains exact, so no asset-specific angle bias is applied.
